batch_summary: In the apartment, Rachel vents her frustration over her stagnant relationship with Joshua, storming off after Monica brings up her past. Meanwhile, a depressed Chandler tries to regress "phases" by stripping down to sweatpants. Phoebe and Monica convince him to join them for a trip to a strip club to cheer him up. Elsewhere, Joey arrives at Silvercup Studios for a shoot, where he spots Charlton Heston and is suddenly struck by a mysterious, foul odor on set.
cumulative_summary: In the apartment, Rachel is highly frustrated by her lack of progress with Joshua. When Monica points out Rachel's own past impulsive behavior, Rachel storms off in annoyance. Meanwhile, Chandler is dealing with his own setback and attempts to regress to an easier "phase" of life by stripping off his pants to reveal sweatpants. Monica and Phoebe refuse to let him wallow, with Phoebe aggressively convincing him to join them for a night out at a strip club instead. Elsewhere, Joey arrives at Silvercup Studios for an acting gig. After spotting legendary actor Charlton Heston eating licorice, Joey's excitement is interrupted when he detects a mysterious and incredibly foul odor on the set.

batch_summary: At the studio, Joey is mortified to learn that he is the source of the foul odor and secretly plots to use Charlton Heston's private dressing room shower. Meanwhile, Chandler, Monica, and Phoebe hang out at a strip club, where Phoebe defends her pregnancy boundaries against a smoker. Rachel eventually joins them, venting her frustration over Joshua not calling and her growing bitterness about Ross's happiness in Vermont, adding to the group's chaotic night out.

batch_summary: Chandler initially laments that "phase three" of his recovery is a failure because he couldn't picture himself with any of the strippers. However, when Monica, Rachel, and Phoebe begin discussing which strippers they found attractive, Chandler's imagination is sparked. He hilariously claims he has reached "phase three" and "phase four" by picturing his friends with the strippers, leaving the women thoroughly repulsed. Later at Central Perk, a still-glum Chandler is comforted by Joey, who laments missing out on the strip club trip.
